129: // TestApiPaginateCredentials asserts that the API automatically paginates to retrieve
130: // all Credentials in a single invocation.
131: func TestApiPaginateCredentials(t *testing.T) {
132: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
133: 	t.Skip("Skipping test due to 'large estimated count' bug: ICU-16649")
134: 	c, err := loadTestConfig()
135: 	require.NoError(t, err)
136: 
137: 	client, err := boundary.NewApiClient()
138: 	require.NoError(t, err)
139: 	ctx := context.Background()
140: 	sClient := scopes.NewClient(client)
141: 	cClient := credentials.NewClient(client)
142: 	orgId, err := boundary.CreateOrgApi(t, ctx, client)
143: 	require.NoError(t, err)
144: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
145: 		ctx := context.Background()
146: 		_, err := sClient.Delete(ctx, orgId)
147: 		require.NoError(t, err)
148: 	})
149: 	projectId, err := boundary.CreateProjectApi(t, ctx, client, orgId)
150: 	require.NoError(t, err)
151: 	storeId, err := boundary.CreateCredentialStoreStaticApi(t, ctx, client, projectId)
152: 	require.NoError(t, err)
153: 
154: 	// Create enough credentials to overflow a single page.
155: 	var credentialIds []string
156: 	for i := 0; i < c.MaxPageSize+1; i++ {
157: 		resp, err := cClient.Create(
158: 			ctx,
159: 			"username_password",
160: 			storeId,
161: 			credentials.WithUsernamePasswordCredentialUsername("user"),
162: 			credentials.WithUsernamePasswordCredentialPassword("password"),
163: 		)
164: 		require.NoError(t, err)
165: 		credentialIds = append(
166: 			credentialIds,
167: 			resp.Item.Id,
168: 		)
169: 	}
170: 
171: 	// List Credentials
172: 	initialCredentials, err := cClient.List(ctx, storeId)
173: 	require.NoError(t, err)
174: 
175: 	var returnedIds []string
176: 	for _, cred := range initialCredentials.Items {
177: 		returnedIds = append(returnedIds, cred.Id)
178: 	}
179: 
180: 	require.Len(t, initialCredentials.Items, c.MaxPageSize+1)
181: 	assert.Empty(t, cmp.Diff(returnedIds, credentialIds, cmpopts.SortSlices(func(i, j string) bool { return i < j })))
182: 	assert.Equal(t, "complete", initialCredentials.ResponseType)
183: 	assert.Empty(t, initialCredentials.RemovedIds)
184: 	assert.NotEmpty(t, initialCredentials.ListToken)
185: 	mapItems, ok := initialCredentials.GetResponse().Map["items"]
186: 	require.True(t, ok)
187: 	mapSliceItems, ok := mapItems.([]any)
188: 	require.True(t, ok)
189: 	assert.Len(t, mapSliceItems, c.MaxPageSize+1)
190: 
191: 	// Create a new credential and destroy one of the other Credentials
192: 	credentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordApi(t, ctx, client, storeId, "user", "password")
193: 	require.NoError(t, err)
194: 	_, err = cClient.Delete(ctx, initialCredentials.Items[0].Id)
195: 	require.NoError(t, err)
196: 
197: 	// List again, should have the new and deleted credential
198: 	newCredentials, err := cClient.List(ctx, storeId, credentials.WithListToken(initialCredentials.ListToken))
199: 	require.NoError(t, err)
200: 
201: 	// Note that this will likely contain all the credentials,
202: 	// since they were created very shortly before the listing,
203: 	// and we add a 30 second buffer to the lower bound of update
204: 	// times when listing.
205: 	require.GreaterOrEqual(t, len(newCredentials.Items), 1)
206: 	// The first item should be the most recently created, which
207: 	// should be our new credential
208: 	firstItem := newCredentials.Items[0]
209: 	assert.Equal(t, credentialId, firstItem.Id)
210: 	assert.Equal(t, "complete", newCredentials.ResponseType)
211: 	// Note that the removed IDs may contain entries from other tests,
